title: rosa canina var. celerata
intro: Rosa canina var. celerata, also known as the wild rose or dog rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosa genus, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible hips. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. celerata include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rosa canina var. celerata include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Rosa canina var. celerata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in jams, jellies, and other food products, making it a versatile and valuable plant for both medicinal and culinary purposes.
benefits: Rosa canina var. celerata has many benefits, such as acting as a natural remedy for various health issues, including high blood pressure, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease, due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. This plant also exhibits anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve wound healing, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. The Rosa canina var. celerata plant is also rich in vitamins and minerals, making it a valuable source of nutrition, particularly for individuals with malnutrition or those who require a boost of energy. By utilizing the benefits of this plant, individuals can improve their overall well-being, enhance their quality of life, and increase their resistance to diseases, ultimately leading to a healthier and more fulfilling existence.
actions: Rosa canina var. celerata has many therapeutic actions, such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, antioxidant, and anti-histamine properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of allergies, eczema, and skin irritations. Its antiseptic properties make it effective in wound healing, reducing the risk of infection and promoting faster recovery. Additionally, the plant's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory actions can help protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, ultimately reducing the risk of chronic diseases. By utilizing the therapeutic actions of Rosa canina var. celerata, individuals can experience improved overall well-being, enhanced skin health, and a reduced risk of chronic illnesses, making it a valuable natural remedy for daily life.
intro_study: According to "Food & function", Rosa canina var. celerata benefits from the leaf extract include significant antimicrobial and antibiofilm properties, particularly inhibiting biofilm growth in certain bacteria at sub-MIC levels.
constituents: Rosa canina var. celerata has many active constituents, such as flavonoids (kaempferol and quercetin), phenolic acids (gallic acid and ellagic acid), and triterpenoids (ursolic and oleanolic acid), as well as essential oils (borneol, camphor, and geraniol), which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. These constituents can help improve people's daily lives by reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and eczema, protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress, and preventing the growth of bacteria and fungi. Additionally, the vitamins and minerals present in Rosa canina var. celerata, including vitamin C and potassium, can help boost the immune system and support cardiovascular health. By utilizing these medicinal constituents, individuals can experience improved overall well-being and quality of life.
